generated_oml:
instance PostOccupancyDataSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensors configured within BIM model to capture post-occupancy data for continuous synchronization between physical assets and digital counterparts"
    DTDFVocab:producedData PostOccupancyDataTransmitted
]

instance PostOccupancyDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom PostOccupancyDataSensor
]

instance PostOccupancyData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Post-occupancy sensor data used for real-time synchronization"
    DTDFVocab:fromData PostOccupancyDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono, Ditto
]

instance EclipseHono : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Hono middleware for real-time data exchange between physical assets and digital twins"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataSynchronizationService
]

instance Ditto : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Ditto middleware for real-time data exchange between physical assets and digital twins"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataSynchronizationService
]

instance DataSynchronizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for synchronizing physical and digital twin states in real-time"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeMonitoringInsight
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring of building systems for continuous synchronization"
]

instance BIMGeometricModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "BIM-based geometric model representing building structure and layout"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ModelTransformationEnabler
]

instance BCSSemanticModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Semantic representation of Building Control Systems components including sensors, actuators, and controllers"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ModelTransformationEnabler
]

instance ModelTransformationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-Driven Engineering process for transforming enriched models into deployable DT artifacts"
    DTDFVocab:enables ModelGenerationService
]

instance ModelGenerationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for generating deployable DT artifacts from enriched models"
    DTDFVocab:provides ModelDeploymentInsight
]

instance ModelDeploymentInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight related to deployable DT artifacts generation"
]

instance PredictiveAnalyticsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics service for infrastructure optimization"
    DTDFVocab:provides PredictiveInsight
]

instance PredictiveInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive insights for infrastructure optimization"
]

instance DecisionMakingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Decision-making service supporting stakeholders throughout building lifecycle"
    DTDFVocab:provides CustomAnalyticsInsight, RemoteActuationAction
]

instance CustomAnalyticsInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Custom analytics for decision-making support"
]

instance RemoteActuationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Remote control of lighting systems via Digital Twin"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance LightingSystemActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Lighting system actuator controlled via Digital Twin"
]

instance ModularArchitecture : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Modular architecture with standardized extension points for integrating custom services and analytics"
]

instance CentralizedFramework : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Centralized framework coordinating multiple digital twin instances"
    base:contains BuildingControlEngineerRole, FacilityManagerRole, DTEngineerRole
]

instance BuildingControlEngineerRole : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Building Control Engineers perform device modeling in BIM"
]

instance FacilityManagerRole : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Facility Managers handle real-time monitoring and control"
]

instance DTEngineerRole : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "DT Engineers extend analytics services via standardized extension points"
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control signals are transmitted from the digital twin to Building Control Systems (BCS) via bidirectional communication mechanisms."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time data exchange capabilities ensure continuous synchronization between physical buildings and their digital counterparts"
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Centralized DT Framework orchestrates component integration via coordinated roles (Building Control Engineers, Facility Managers, DT Engineers) and modular architecture, facilitating bidirectional data exchange and holistic building lifecycle management"
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin lifecycle encompasses initial device modeling within BIM environments by Building Control Engineers, transformation of enriched BIM models into structured representations via Model-Driven Engineering (MDE) for automatic artifact generation, real-time data exchange for synchronization with physical infrastructure, interactive visualization for Facility Manager monitoring and control operations, and modular extension points enabling DT Engineers to integrate custom services for evolving functionality."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Model fidelity is validated using the Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric, which quantifies the alignment between the digital twin and its physical counterpart to ensure accurate representation of real-world conditions."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Eclipse Hono and Ditto middleware facilitate bidirectional data exchange between physical and virtual assets."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Integration with external systems through BIM-based data exchange and tools for device modeling, addressing interoperability across heterogeneous systems as specified in nonfunctional requirements (NF_X)"
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The framework standardizes BIM semantics for Building Control System (BCS) components to address BIM's limitations, adhering to AECO-specific standards. Standardized integration frameworks and extension points ensure interoperability and compliance with industry specifications for DT deployment."
]
